response.original_title: Chase McDozer in The Final Shot
response.overview: Chase McDozer embarks on his most dangerous mission yet! The head of the mob John Baker calls upon 5 of the most sadistic supervillains to form his team, the half dozen. Can Chase stop them? Find out in the third movie of the the best spy trilogy there is.
response.tagline: Who will get the final shot?
response.title: Chase McDozer in The Final Shot
